consensus_points.issue: Architect output was better at diagnosis than execution detail.
consensus_points.resolution: Keep the canonical execution spine and promote the architect's stronger truth upgrades into it.

consensus_points.issue: Future ARC handoffs can stop too early at architecture prose.
consensus_points.resolution: Require both architecture output and machine-execution output in future architect handoffs.

consensus_points.issue: SNT attacks were not frozen as mandatory categories.
consensus_points.resolution: Mandate founder-surface deception, transport truth, stale authority, and soft-acceptance attacks in all future SNT passes.
Studio must own founder-usability and interaction-quality artifacts for founder-facing surfaces.

consensus_points.issue: Lower-tier coder ambiguity remained too high.
consensus_points.resolution: Add default coder_must_not_decide boundaries and tighten step-level constraints.

consensus_points.issue: Better answers could remain in chat or side notes.
consensus_points.resolution: Promotion into canonical authority must be required or explicitly rejected with reason.

arc_action_required: Update the canonical founder packet with the new laws.
Update the canonical blueprint with promotion receipts, default coder boundaries, Studio usability authority, and stronger architect/SNT enforcement.
Update acceptance and authority artifacts to enforce the promoted rules.
